Game: Godzilla- Kaijuu Daikessen 1994-12-09T00:00:00-08:00 Godzilla Kaijuu Daikessen ("Godzilla: Monster War") is a 2D fighter for the Super Famicom featuring famous Toho kaiju. While the game was released in Japan only, a US version was in production at one point under the working title Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters. It is the sequel to the 1993 TurboGrafx-CD Godzilla fighter Godzilla: Battle Legends, also developed by Alfa System. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/4662ce94-fcc3-4915-815f-c840b51b8270.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/8df6ba1d-4952-4af0-9fd7-7e2fee37d1f2.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/cb64c032-606a-415e-8968-b11226515495.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/b3dad8b8-7b61-40fd-9ade-34d08de88924.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/fbb9fe52-0bdc-41da-a681-28edac394bf4.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/f392916d-8bbc-4bd8-a0f1-1ea019e2d390.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/c79bfa41-445e-4ead-964e-576216fb111f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/8c274ded-c54c-4c2e-8eb9-92f9fdea95b1.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/96568094-ded5-4141-bc96-8b1084df2ed4.png Fighting Alfa System Toho Company Ltd.
